api.domains.errors.domain_id_required.text: E hiahiatia ana te ID rohe

api.domains.errors.organization_not_foun.text: Kāore i kitea te whakahaere mō te rohe: %{domain}

api.domains.errors.incoming_secrets_disa.text: Kāore ngā karere huna taemai i te whakahohea i runga i tēnei taupānga

api.domains.errors.incoming_config_not_f.text: Kāore i kitea te whirihoranga taemai mō te rohe: %{extid}

api.domains.errors.recipients_max_exceed.text: %{max} kaiwhiwhi te mōrahi e whakaaetia ana

api.domains.errors.recipients_duplicate.text: Kāore e whakaaetia ngā īmēra kaiwhiwhi tārua
